faq.question: what is cyber-shield
faq.answer: Cyber-Shield is a cybersecurity portal with practical tools and guided secure experience. Protect your data and safeguard your online presence.

faq.question: how to use url analyzer
faq.answer: Paste a URL in the URL analyzer form. Click Analyze URL + AI Agent. It runs multi-source checks and AI scoring. See risk score, confidence, and factors.

faq.question: what is url challenge
faq.answer: URL Challenge is a learning game. Train on suspicious link patterns and domain signals. Practice identifying phishing links.

faq.question: which game should i play to know about url
how to analyze apk
faq.answer: Enter APK package or hash in the APK analyzer. Select source like Play Store or Direct Download. Click Analyze APK + AI Agent. It scans metadata, signatures, and threat intel.

faq.question: what is apk challenge
faq.answer: APK Challenge is a learning game. Practice APK triage using package/hash indicators. Learn to spot malware in Android apps.

faq.question: which game should i play to know about apk
how to check email
faq.answer: Paste email text in the Email analyzer. Click Analyze Email + AI Agent. It identifies phishing intent from headers and message tone.

faq.question: what is email challenge
faq.answer: Email Challenge is a learning game. Identify phishing intent from headers and message tone. Practice spotting suspicious emails.

faq.question: which game should i play to know about email
what is password challenge
faq.answer: Password Challenge is a learning game. Build strong passphrases and avoid common password attacks. Learn secure password practices.

faq.question: which game should i play to know about password
what is social engineering challenge
faq.answer: Social Engineering Challenge is a learning game. Spot manipulation tactics across chat, calls, and messages. Practice recognizing social engineering.

faq.question: which game should i play to know about social engineering
what is incident response challenge
faq.answer: Incident Response Challenge is a learning game. Practice first-response actions after suspicious activity alerts. Learn incident response steps.

faq.question: which game should i play to know about incident response
how to login
faq.answer: Go to auth view. Enter registered email and password. Click Login. Access your cyber dashboard with learning resources and Analyzer tools.

faq.question: how to sign up
faq.answer: Go to auth view. Click Sign Up. Enter full name, email, and password. Click Sign Up. Create account to access dashboard.

faq.question: what is risk score
faq.answer: Risk score is percentage from 0 to 100. Shows overall risk level. Low, medium, or high based on analysis.

faq.question: what is confidence
faq.answer: Confidence is percentage showing how sure the analysis is. Based on signal quality from current inputs.

faq.question: how to use support chat
faq.answer: Go to Support section. Type question about cybersecurity. Click Ask AI. Get guidance on suspicious links, emails, APKs, or account security.

faq.question: what is leaderboard
faq.answer: Leaderboard tracks score progression. Compare rankings and review recent game runs in real time. See total runs, average score, best score.

faq.question: how to play games
faq.answer: Go to Learn tab. Click on game cards like URL Challenge or APK Challenge. Play learning games to train on security topics.

faq.question: what is analyzer
faq.answer: Analyzer tab has tools for URL, APK, and Email analysis. Run multi-source checks and AI scoring. Get risk analysis with factors.

faq.question: how to check risk factors
faq.answer: After analysis, see risk factors section. Lists signals like suspicious words, domain issues, or malware indicators.

faq.question: which game to play for url
learn url security
faq.answer: Play URL Challenge in Learn section

faq.question: which game to play for apk
learn apk security
faq.answer: Play APK Challenge in Learn section

faq.answer: Play Email Challenge in Learn section

faq.question: which game to play for password
learn password security
faq.answer: Play Password Challenge in Learn section

game to learn about social engineering
